title: Renamed card image fields to a structured object
description: The flat imageUrl string was replaced by an images object exposing low and high resolution variants. Update clients reading card.imageUrl to card.images.high.

title: Added multilingual set and series names
description: Sets and series now return localized names for all supported languages, selectable via the /v2/{lang} path segment.

title: Fixed missing rarity on promo cards
description: Promotional cards previously returned a null rarity. They now report the rarity Promo so filtering by rarity behaves consistently.
